annotators.blinding: Re-annotated the same excerpts from source text only, no access to first-pass JSON. Compared after both passes were complete.

model_draft_provenance.note: Second pass was produced from source text only, not from the first-pass JSON.

review_notes: Second-pass annotations are self-reproductions after a delay, not independent annotations. Treat the resulting IAA as a smoke check, not a paper-grade reliability number.
